name: llm-memory-eval: A Reproducible Evaluation Harness for Summarization-Based Memory and Retrieval-Augmented Generation in Large Language Models
description: Open-source Python package operationalizing a controlled, within-instance, repeated-measures comparison of Summarization-Based Memory and Retrieval-Augmented Generation for long-term conversational performance in large language models, evaluated across the LongBench, LoCoMo, and LongMemEval benchmarks with a complete pre-registered statistical pipeline.

affiliation.name: University of the Cumberlands, Williamsburg, Kentucky, USA
